stories.title: World Cup Daily live: Canada, South Africa kick of...
Sources: Suns land Bridges in deal with Hornets
stories.summary: The Hornets are trading Miles Bridges, a 2029 first-round pick and a second-round pick to the Suns for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a 2033 first.

stories.title: Balogun: U.S. finding 'another gear' for knockouts...
stories.summary: United States forward Folarin Balogun said he can "feel the difference" in the atmosphere around the World Cup now that the knockout stage has begun.

stories.title: Serena chides anti-doping system: 'I hate it'
stories.summary: Serena Williams took aim at tennis' anti-doping system ahead of her Wimbledon return, calling it "unprofessional" and "unreasonable."

stories.title: South Korea coach quits after WC exit, criticism
stories.summary: South Korea coach Hong Myung-Bo resigned Sunday, a day after the team's quick elimination from the World Cup and following heavy criticism from the country's president.
